name: mcp-server-saxo
description: MCP server for Saxo Bank's OpenAPI. SIM by default, LIVE behind explicit opt-in.
long_description: Exposes the Saxo Bank OpenAPI to MCP-compatible agents over stdio. Tools cover account/portfolio reads, instrument and option-chain reference data, snapshot quotes, strategy screeners, whole-account portfolio planning, single-leg and multi-leg option orders, Saxo price alerts, and OAuth login. LIVE trading is denied by default; SIM is the default environment. All write tools run through a policy + audit stack with default-deny semantics on LIVE.

SAXO_ENVIRONMENT.title: Environment
SAXO_ENVIRONMENT.description: sim (simulation) or live. Defaults to sim. LIVE writes additionally require SAXO_ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING=true and a policy.json that allows live writes.

SAXO_ACCESS_TOKEN.title: Access token
SAXO_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Bearer token. For quick SIM testing paste a 24-hour token from https://www.developer.saxo. For durable use (recommended) leave blank and fill in the OAuth fields below — the server will mint and refresh tokens.

SAXO_REFRESH_TOKEN.title: Refresh token
SAXO_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: OAuth refresh token. Required for durable runs longer than the access token's TTL (~20 minutes on SIM). Obtain with `npm run auth` against the source repo, or via the saxo_oauth_start / saxo_oauth_complete tools.

SAXO_TOKEN_EXPIRES_AT.title: Access-token expiry (ISO 8601)
SAXO_TOKEN_EXPIRES_AT.description: Optional. If set, lets the client refresh proactively. Otherwise computed from the JWT exp claim.

SAXO_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_AT.title: Refresh-token expiry (ISO 8601)
SAXO_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_AT.description: Optional. Stored by OAuth login/refresh when Saxo returns refresh_token_expires_in; used only for diagnostics and warnings.

SAXO_APP_KEY.title: App key
SAXO_APP_KEY.description: OAuth application key from developer.saxo. Required when using OAuth refresh.

SAXO_APP_SECRET.title: App secret
SAXO_APP_SECRET.description: OAuth application secret. Required when using OAuth refresh.

SAXO_REDIRECT_URI.title: OAuth redirect URI
SAXO_REDIRECT_URI.description: Loopback URI registered in the Saxo app. Must use the hostname `localhost` (Saxo rejects IP-literal redirects). Only used by the saxo_oauth_* tools.

SAXO_TOKEN_STORE_PATH.title: Token-store JSON path
SAXO_TOKEN_STORE_PATH.description: Optional. JSON file path where OAuth tools and automatic refresh can persist rotated Saxo tokens. Useful for MCPB / desktop clients where editing .env files is awkward.

SAXO_PERSIST_TOKENS_ON_REFRESH.title: Persist tokens on refresh
SAXO_PERSIST_TOKENS_ON_REFRESH.description: When true, automatic request-time refresh writes rotated tokens to SAXO_TOKEN_ENV_FILE_PATH (or .env). SAXO_TOKEN_STORE_PATH is written whenever configured.

SAXO_TOKEN_ENV_FILE_PATH.title: Token env file path
SAXO_TOKEN_ENV_FILE_PATH.description: Optional env file used when SAXO_PERSIST_TOKENS_ON_REFRESH=true or when OAuth tools are called with writeToEnvFile=true and no explicit envFilePath.

SAXO_TIMEOUT_MS.title: Request timeout (ms)
SAXO_TIMEOUT_MS.description: HTTP timeout for Saxo OpenAPI calls.

ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY.title: Alpha Vantage API key
ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY.description: Optional. Enables Alpha Vantage OVERVIEW fundamentals plus NEWS_SENTIMENT and EARNINGS_CALENDAR when strategy tools opt into that enrichment. Leave blank to keep screening Saxo-only.

SAXO_STRATEGY_SNAPSHOT_PATH.title: Strategy snapshot path
SAXO_STRATEGY_SNAPSHOT_PATH.description: Optional. JSON file used by saxo_review_strategy_positions when the tool call does not pass strategyPositions or strategySnapshotPath. Leave blank for account-status-only reviews or pass strategyPositions directly.

SAXO_ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING.title: Enable LIVE trading
SAXO_ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING.description: Master switch for LIVE order writes. Must also be allowed in policy.json. Leave false for SIM-only use.

SAXO_ENABLE_LIVE_ALERT_WRITES.title: Enable LIVE price alert writes
SAXO_ENABLE_LIVE_ALERT_WRITES.description: Master switch for LIVE Saxo price-alert create/update/delete/settings writes. Must also be allowed in policy.json with allow_live_alert_writes=true. Does not enable order/trading writes.

SAXO_POLICY_PATH.title: policy.json path
SAXO_POLICY_PATH.description: Optional. Path to a policy.json that constrains which AccountKeys, AssetTypes, Uics, and notionals are tradable. See policy.example.json in the source repo.

SAXO_AUDIT_LOG.title: Audit log path
SAXO_AUDIT_LOG.description: Optional. Writes JSONL audit events for every tool call (start, finish, error, policy denial). Inputs are SHA-256 hashed.
